title: eBEE AG – The Advanced Agriculture Drone
subtitle: eBEE AG - L’agriculture avancée Drone
description: A guide to the eBee AG agricultural drone, presenting its capabilities in precision crop monitoring and integration with farm management systems. The document outlines how the drone's Duet M multispectral/RGB camera, automated flights and extended battery life provide timely plant health data to optimize crop planning, reduce inputs, and improve profitability.
